ab: Pneapa su manu miyah?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Mnksa ku.
en: I came on foot.

ab: Pneapa su rulu manu miyah?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: Pneapa ku basu.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: Pshuya su musa prhulan?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Pgriq rulu ka tama ni supu nami musa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: Shuya musa sapah pyasan kjiyax ka hiya?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Peapa ceyyun musa sapah pyasan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Shuya musa marig damac ka bubu su rudan?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Peapa utubay musa marig damac.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: Pshuya su musa Ranyutaw hug?
en: A: How are you going to get to Lantau Island?

ab: Peapa ku asu musa Ranyu.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: Pshuya musa Ranyutaw ka hiya hug?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Peapa sapah skaya musa Ranyu ka hiya.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: Peapa rulu manu musa Kawsyung ka hiya.
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: Peapa Kawtey musa Kawsyung ka hiya.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Peapa rulu qrngul musa Tay-tong ka hiya hug?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Iq! Peapa rulu qrngul musa Tay-tong ka hiya.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: Peapa rulu qrngul musa Tay-tong ka hiya hug?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Uxay wah! Peapa sapah skaya musa Tay-tong ka hiya.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Niqan saan tmaga basu ka kiyig hini hug?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Niqan wah! Klelug brah mksa do qtaun su ka saan tmaga basu da.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Inu ka sdalih bi ceyyuncan hug?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Ungac ceyyuncan ka hini, wana haya ka tduwa ppanun.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Musa piya patas hidaw ka ppanan basu, kika pdhuq sapah pyasan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: 15 spngan do pdhuq sapah pyasan da.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Kndadax Taypey dhuq Taycung o musa piya patas hidaw hug?
ch: A:搭高鐵自臺北到臺中要多少時間？
en: A: How long does it take to take the THSR from Taipei to Taichung?

ab: Kingal patas hidaw do pdhuq Taycung da.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Kndadax Cirung dhuq Uray o musa piya patas hidaw hug?
ch: A: 從基隆開車去烏來要很久嗎?
en: A: Is it a long drive from Keelung to Ulai?

ab: Nasi tluus ka kleelug o yabi musa hari kingal patas hidaw do pdhuq da.
ch: B:如果路況順利的話，大約要一個小時可以抵達。
en: B: If the road condition is good, it will take about an hour to get there.

ab: Peapa su ceyyun miyah sapah mu o bsiyaq hug?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Asi ka 20 spngan.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mkla su peapa ddeynsya hug?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mkla ku peapa ddeynsya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Niqan su utubay hug?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Niqan ku kingal utubay.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Niqan su utubay hug?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Ungac ku utubay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
